title: Using AI to outsmart drug-resistant bacteria
summary: Google DeepMind researchers at the University of Cambridge are using AlphaFold, Gemini, and Co-Scientist to accelerate antibacterial drug discovery by identifying bacterial resistance mechanisms. The AI approach compresses research that traditionally took years into minutes, enabling faster identification of targets to combat antimicrobial resistance.
